text: Laikipia County is one of the 47 Counties in the Republic of Kenya. “Laikipia” is a Maasai word meaning
vast plains with pastures reflecting the large highland plateau. It borders Samburu County to the North,
Isiolo County to the North East, Meru County to the East, Nyeri County to the South East, Nyandarua
